workLog.task: Issue #2005: memory-as-passive-reference fails when the writing path skips a memory read (PR #2004)
workLog.outcome: Added a non-blocking PreToolUse hook on Write|Edit that derives a topic from the file path and surfaces top-3 topical .serena/memories as advisory context (2KB cap, 80ms deadline, filesystem-only).
